summary: Updated SIMMUTU realisation input UX as requested: moved numerator/denominator definitions to sit directly under each input field, added live JavaScript percentage preview before saving, displayed current inputter name from logged-in auth user, and made department auto-follow login user department (shown read-only when user has dep_id). Kept indicator description/frequency panel and preserved backend submission shape.
current_status: Realisasi input page now gives clearer guidance near numeric fields and real-time feedback. Auto identity/dept behavior is implemented on the form; build and lints pass.
